name: Vital Energy
event_text: Each Hero and Villager moves 2 spaces toward the Purple Monster closest to them.

name: Awaiting the hunt

name: Destruction

name: Gyrocopter Search
event_text: Turn a revealed Lair face down, then mix up all facedown Lairs. Move the Frenzy Marker to the next Monster.

name: Folie a Deux

name: Provisions
event_text: Each player draws 1 item from the bag or discard pile and keeps it. Move each Villager 1 space toward their safe location.
